name: Vildagliptin And Metformin HCL Tablets
about: Vildagliptin And Metformin HCL Tablets are a combination medication used to treat type 2 diabetes. These tablets come in a physical form of tablets and each box contains 6x15 tablets. The dosage of each tablet is 50\500mg and the medicine is sourced from India. These tablets are a type of general medicine and should be stored in dry and cool places. Dosage guidelines should be followed as per the doctors suggestion. This medicine is a combination of two active ingredients, Vildagliptin and Metformin HCL, which work together to control blood sugar levels in the body.

faq.q: What is the dosage of each Vildagliptin And Metformin HCL Tablet?
faq.a: The dosage of each tablet is 50\500mg.

faq.q: What is the origin of Vildagliptin And Metformin HCL Tablets?
faq.a: The medicine is sourced from India.

faq.q: What is the physical form of Vildagliptin And Metformin HCL Tablets?
faq.a: The physical form of the medicine is tablets.

faq.q: How should Vildagliptin And Metformin HCL Tablets be stored?
faq.a: These tablets should be stored in a dry and cool place.

faq.q: Are there any specific dosage guidelines for Vildagliptin And Metformin HCL Tablets?
faq.a: Dosage guidelines should be followed as per the doctors suggestion.
